name: hover-card
title: Hover Card
description: Rich preview card that appears on hover. Built on Base UI PreviewCard. Use for user profiles, repository previews, and link context. Dismissed when the pointer leaves.

meta.usage: Use to show a rich preview of a linked resource — user profile, repository, document, or URL — when the pointer rests on a trigger link. Content is read-only; for interactive controls use Popover. Trigger should be a link or button with meaningful text so the hover card supplements rather than replaces accessible copy.
never: Never put interactive controls (forms, buttons) inside HoverCardContent — use Popover
Never use HoverCard for single-line labels — use Tooltip
Never rely on HoverCard for touch-only users; it requires hover; pair with an accessible tap alternative
Never use HoverCard for confirmation or blocking UI — use Dialog or AlertDialog
